value.body:
## Context

`packages/backend/SPEC.md` defines the target reusable backend runtime. Desktop currently owns too much app backend composition.

## Outcome

`@cycle/backend` becomes the Effect-managed runtime for database, workspace, bootstrap, API, hosted MCP, agents, chat, background tasks, and status.

## Acceptance criteria

- Backend runtime can be launched by desktop and tests without importing Electron or renderer code.
- Desktop delegates backend composition to `@cycle/backend` and retains only shell/lifecycle concerns.
- Runtime exposes structured status for API, repositories, agents, tasks, and shutdown.
- Existing persisted paths and discovery behavior remain compatible.
- Typecheck and tests pass for backend, desktop, API, and affected packages.

frontmatter.title: Extract desktop backend composition into @cycle/backend runtime

value.title: Extract desktop backend composition into @cycle/backend runtime
